title: Spicy Veggie Stir-Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir-fry dish made with a variety of vegetables, perfect for a quick and delicious meal.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the bell peppers and onion and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until they start to soften.
Add the broccoli and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes until it starts to tenderize.
Add the soy sauce and sriracha and stir-fry for 1 minute until the vegetables are well coated.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions if desired.
